title: Irish Cream Stir Fry
description: A unique and rich Chinese-inspired dish combining the flavors of Ireland with the stir-fry technique. Serve over steamed rice for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: stir fry
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger, stir-frying for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Pour in Irish cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and stir in cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with soy sauce and sugar to taste.
Serve over steamed rice and garnish with green onions if desired.
